   contain the root `toctree` directive.

SDA Project Phase 2: GDP Analysis
=================================

Welcome to the developer documentation for the **GDP Analysis** project. 

This application is built using a **Modular Orchestration** architecture, heavily emphasizing the **Dependency Inversion Principle**. It allows for flexible data ingestion (CSV, JSON) and output rendering (Console, Graphics) through a centralized core transformation engine.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: API Reference:

   modules

==================
